title: CA Search and Scrape - Airtable Integration
description: Searches Vistage CA database, scrapes member profiles, and writes results directly back to Airtable. Designed for use with Airtable Automations.

airtable_token.title: Airtable Personal Access Token
airtable_token.description: Your Airtable Personal Access Token with write access to the base. Create at: https://airtable.com/create/tokens

airtable_base_id.title: Airtable Base ID
airtable_base_id.description: The ID of your Airtable base (starts with 'app'). Found in the URL when viewing your base.

airtable_table_name.title: Airtable Table Name
airtable_table_name.description: The name of the table to update

record_id.title: Airtable Record ID
record_id.description: The ID of the record to update (passed from Airtable automation)

linkedin_slug.title: LinkedIn Profile Slug
linkedin_slug.description: LinkedIn profile URL or slug (e.g., 'john-smith-123' or full URL)

search_name.title: Person's Full Name
search_name.description: Full name to search for (requires expected_company)

expected_company.title: Expected Company Name
expected_company.description: Company name to verify match against (required with search_name)

auto_scrape.title: Auto-scrape high confidence matches
auto_scrape.description: Automatically scrape full profile details for matches with ≥70% confidence
